last_completed_round.hypothesis: Round 18 provided clean negative evidence on the grouped_rows=8 alternate PTX surface. Runtime jumped from 24.17296028 ms to 24.53401566 ms, long-scoreboard widened from 7.13% to 7.33%, and the branch fell far outside the current 24.16-24.18 band. The next move should be to restore the PTX winner surface again, re-anchor the search on the known-good grouped_rows=4 implementation, and only then spend further rounds on alternate geometry or sibling-surface families.
